meaning: adj.未完成的,未琢磨的,未染色的
examples: There is still some unfinished business to settle.
We have some unfinished business to settle.
He has some unfinished business to deal with.
The Unfinished Swan has four chapters, and the white-room-black-paint chapter is only the first.
Creating more wealth isn't the driver This consummate dealmaker is motivated by unfinished business.
